intro.title: Writing Functions
intro.bodyMarkdown:
Writing Functions is a core topic when learning R for data analysis, statistics, and reproducible research.

Practicing this topic builds fluency with R syntax, data structures, and the tidyverse ecosystem.

Run the sample code below, experiment in the editor, then work through the challenges.

challenges.title: Easy: Recognize Writing Functions
challenges.promptMarkdown: Write R code related to **Writing Functions**. Include: `function`.

challenges.title: Medium: Complete the pattern
challenges.promptMarkdown: Complete code that demonstrates **Writing Functions**.

challenges.title: Hard: Apply the concept
challenges.promptMarkdown: Apply **Writing Functions** in a short R snippet.

questions.prompt: What best describes Writing Functions?

choices.label: A core R concept covered in this topic

This topic is important in R because:

intro.title: Function Arguments
intro.bodyMarkdown:
Function Arguments is a core topic when learning R for data analysis, statistics, and reproducible research.

Practicing this topic builds fluency with R syntax, data structures, and the tidyverse ecosystem.
